Notice Of Motion To Compel Settlement Agreemen; Declaration Of Robert L. Shepard In Support Of Motion; P/A In Support Of Motion; Proposes Judgment; Pos
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TEXT 100, INC. Motion to Compel Settlement Agreement. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel settlement agreement is denied. Court lacks subject matter jurisdiction. See Hagan Engineering vs. Mills (2003) 115 Cal.App. 4th 1004. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976
